zh.Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓
英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾克斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston是Gilbert Ormeston的女兒，於1477年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾普雷斯頓。她於1500年與Nicholas Rigby III在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1566年4月2日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston是Gilbert Ormeston的女儿，于1477年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾普雷斯頓。她于1500年与Nicholas Rigby III在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1566年4月2日在英国英格兰藍卡爾享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ormeston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (southeastScotland): habitational name from any of the places called Ormiston, in the former counties of Roxburghshire and East Lothian, named with the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Ormr (see Orme ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Orme
meanings: English (Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Orm (Old Norse Ormr, from ormr ‘snake’).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Urmston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Urmston (Lancashire), which derives from the Old English personal name Wyrm or its Old Norse cognate Urm + genitive -s + Old English tūn ‘settlement’.

en.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston was born in 1477, in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Gilbert Ormeston. She married Nicholas Rigby III in 1500, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 2 April 1566, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston est née en 1477, à Preston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Gilbert Ormeston. Elle a épousé Nicholas Rigby III en 1500, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1566, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston wurde 1477 in Preston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Gilbert Ormeston geboren. Sie hat 1500 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Nicholas Rigby III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. April 1566 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston è nata il nel 1477 nel Preston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Gilbert Ormeston. Lei sposato Nicholas Rigby III nel 1500, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 2 aprile 1566, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormestonは1477年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアプレストンでGilbert Ormestonの娘として生まれた。1500年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでNicholas Rigby IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1566年4月2日にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston(은)는 1477년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 프레스턴에서 Gilbert Ormeston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Nicholas Rigby III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1566년 4월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston nasceu em 1477, em Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Gilbert Ormeston. Ela casou-se com Nicholas Rigby III em 1500, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1566, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston родилась в 1477 г. в местности престон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Gilbert Ormeston. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas Rigby III в 1500 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 2 апреля 1566 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Agnes Urmston Ormeston nació en 1477, en Preston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Gilbert Ormeston. Se casó con Nicholas Rigby III en 1500, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 2 de abril de 1566, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
